allow: Bash(python3 -m pip install -q fastapi uvicorn pydantic)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d['status']\); p=d['plan']; print\(f'Weeks: {p[\\"total_weeks\\"]}, Start: {p[\\"starting_carbs_per_hour_g\\"]}g/hr, Peak: {p[\\"race_target_carbs_per_hour_g\\"]}g/hr, Total gels: {p[\\"gel_package\\"][\\"total_gels\\"]}'\)")
